tags.name: St. Lukes Community Garden and Orchard

tags.description:
An amazing space tucked behind Oak Grove. Incredible Edible Garforth are busy turning it into a environmentally friendly resource for the community and nature.

Regular events and workshops take place such as forest school, arts and crafts.
